chat_history.content: Tell me about yourself and the kind of person you hope to meet.

I am a man, 31, and live in Oakland. Friends would call me calm, honest, and playful. I work in healthcare and spend weekends hiking, cooking, and listening to music. I'm looking for a long-term relationship with a woman around 27 to 34 who is kind, communicative, and emotionally mature. I do not smoke.
